nodes.name: JniCatalogWrapperTest.java
nodes.summary: Unit tests for JniCatalogWrapper verifying catalog initialization and JNI table operation plumbing.

nodes.name: S3FileIOAssumeRoleAwsClientFactoryTest.java
nodes.summary: Tests for the S3 assume-role AWS client factory, verifying credential provider setup and configuration parsing.

nodes.name: pom.xml
nodes.summary: Maven POM for the JDBC sink connector module, specifying MySQL, PostgreSQL, TiDB and Snowflake driver dependencies.

nodes.name: SchemaTableName.java
nodes.summary: Immutable value class representing a fully-qualified schema and table name for JDBC sink connector operations.

nodes.name: JDBCKeepaliveSocketFactory.java
nodes.summary: Custom socket factory for JDBC connections that enables TCP keepalive to prevent long-lived idle connections from being dropped.

nodes.name: log4j2.properties
nodes.summary: Log4j2 logging configuration for JDBC sink module tests.

nodes.name: pom.xml
nodes.summary: Maven POM for CDC source integration tests, configuring Testcontainers and database driver dependencies.

nodes.name: MongoDbValidatorTest.java
nodes.summary: Integration tests for MongoDbValidator using Testcontainers to spin up a MongoDB replica set and verify validation logic.

nodes.name: SourceTestClient.java
nodes.summary: gRPC test client for CDC source connector end-to-end tests, managing source startup, data ingestion, and event validation against Testcontainer databases.

nodes.name: log4j2.properties
nodes.summary: Log4j2 configuration for CDC source integration tests.

nodes.name: my.cnf
nodes.summary: MySQL configuration file for test containers in CDC source tests, enabling binary logging for Debezium.

nodes.name: orders.tbl
nodes.summary: Empty TPC-H orders table data file used as a placeholder in CDC source integration test resources.

nodes.name: stored_queries.properties
nodes.summary: Properties file containing stored SQL query strings for CDC source integration tests.

nodes.name: pom.xml
nodes.summary: Maven POM for the risingwave-source-cdc module, bundling Debezium connectors for MySQL, PostgreSQL, MongoDB, and SQL Server.

nodes.name: PgCompositeToStringConverter.java
nodes.summary: Debezium custom converter that serializes PostgreSQL composite (row) types to their string representation for CDC event processing.

nodes.name: PgVectorToStringConverter.java
nodes.summary: Debezium converter for pgvector extension types, converting vector data to string format for CDC ingestion into RisingWave.

nodes.name: NoDataRecoverySnapshotter.java
nodes.summary: Custom Debezium snapshotter that skips data snapshot during recovery, resuming only from the saved WAL offset.

nodes.name: MySqlStreamingChangeEventSource.java
nodes.summary: RisingWave-patched Debezium MySQL streaming CDC source that streams binary log events with customized transaction handling.

nodes.name: PgOutputMessageDecoder.java
nodes.summary: RisingWave-patched Debezium decoder for PostgreSQL's pgoutput replication protocol, parsing WAL messages into CDC change events.

nodes.name: ReplicationStream.java
nodes.summary: Interface defining the PostgreSQL replication stream contract for Debezium's streaming CDC source.

nodes.name: PostgresConnectorConfig.java
nodes.summary: RisingWave-patched Debezium PostgreSQL connector configuration, defining all configuration properties for the PostgreSQL CDC source.

nodes.name: PostgresSchema.java
nodes.summary: Manages the PostgreSQL schema registry for the Debezium CDC source, caching and refreshing table metadata from the database.

nodes.name: PostgresStreamingChangeEventSource.java
nodes.summary: RisingWave-patched Debezium PostgreSQL streaming CDC source that reads WAL events via the replication protocol.

nodes.name: SqlServerStreamingChangeEventSource.java
nodes.summary: RisingWave-patched SQL Server streaming CDC source implementation using Debezium to stream change events from SQL Server change tables.

nodes.name: DebeziumOpenLineageEmitter.java
nodes.summary: RisingWave-patched OpenLineage emitter for Debezium, disabled to prevent interference with RisingWave CDC source operations.
